name: Car Rainy Night Portrait
description: Candid portrait of woman in car passenger seat at night with rain on window and city bokeh background
input_prompt: asian woman in car at night with rain on window city lights bokeh

subject.description: young Asian woman with long straight dark hair, calm neutral expression, looking directly at camera

pose.position: sitting in passenger seat of car
pose.body_angle: body angled slightly to the side

environment.location: inside a car interior, passenger seat

weather.details: raindrops clearly visible clinging to side window glass

background: blurred city street lights through wet window

lighting.quality: dome light or flash style illuminating subject
lighting.contrast: subject lit against dark rainy exterior

camera_technical.depth_of_field: cinematic, subject sharp, background bokeh through wet window

realism_anchors: realistic city light bokeh through wet window

flattened_prompt: hyper-realistic candid portrait 8k, young Asian woman sitting in car passenger seat at night, long straight dark hair, black spaghetti strap top, delicate gold necklace, calm neutral expression looking at camera, body angled slightly to side, heavy rain visible raindrops clinging to side window glass, blurred city street lights bokeh through wet window, traffic lights in background, soft artificial dome light or flash illuminating subject, contrast with dark rainy exterior, smartphone photography aesthetic, cinematic depth of field, 9:16
negative_prompt_flat: drawing, cartoon, anime, illustration, low quality, blurry, distorted, daylight, dry weather, sunglasses

color_palette.accent: gold necklace, colored city light bokeh
color_palette.background: dark night, blurred colored lights through rain

flux.prompt: hyper-realistic candid portrait 8k, young Asian woman long dark hair, black spaghetti strap top gold necklace, calm expression looking at camera, sitting in car passenger seat angled to side, night time heavy rain raindrops on window glass, blurred city lights traffic bokeh through wet window, flash photography dome light illuminating subject, dark rainy exterior contrast, smartphone aesthetic cinematic DOF, 9:16
flux.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, blurry, daylight, dry weather, sunglasses, distorted

subject.description: Young Asian woman with long straight dark hair

face.expression: Calm, neutral, soft gaze at camera

pose.position: Sitting in passenger seat of car

scene.environment: Inside car interior, passenger seat, night time
scene.weather: Heavy rain, raindrops clearly visible clinging to side window glass
scene.background: Blurred city street lights and traffic bokeh seen through wet window

lighting.type: Soft artificial interior light (dome light or flash style)
lighting.quality: Illuminating subject, contrasting with dark rainy exterior

camera.style: Photorealistic, candid portrait, smartphone photography aesthetic
camera.depth_of_field: Cinematic, subject sharp, background bokeh through wet window
camera.negative_constraints: no cartoon, no anime, no daylight, no dry weather

midjourney.prompt: candid car portrait, Asian woman long dark hair, black strap top gold necklace, sitting in passenger seat at night, rain on window glass, city lights bokeh through wet window, flash photography lighting --ar 9:16 --style raw --v 6
midjourney.notes: Use --style raw for authentic flash photography aesthetic

ideogram.prompt: Candid portrait of young Asian woman sitting in car at night, long dark hair, wearing black spaghetti strap top and gold necklace, calm expression looking at camera, raindrops visible on window glass, blurred city lights bokeh through wet window, flash photography lighting

recraft.prompt: Car portrait at night, Asian woman in passenger seat, black top gold necklace, rain on window, city lights bokeh, flash lighting

luma.prompt: Rainy night car scene, woman in passenger seat illuminated by soft interior light, raindrops streak down window as city lights blur past, intimate urban moment, quiet atmosphere
luma.motion_notes: Raindrops slowly sliding down window, distant car lights moving through bokeh, subtle breathing

reve.prompt: Moody portrait photography in the style of rainy night urban scenes, Asian woman in car passenger seat, flash photography against rain-streaked window, city bokeh, intimate candid aesthetic

grok-imagine.prompt: Asian woman with long dark hair sitting in car passenger seat at night, black strap top gold necklace, calm expression, rain on window with city lights bokeh, flash photography style, 8k photorealistic

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A young Asian woman with long straight dark hair sits in the passenger seat of a car at night. She wears a black spaghetti-strap top and a delicate gold necklace, with soft natural makeup. Her expression is calm and neutral as she looks directly at the camera with a soft gaze. Her body is angled slightly to the side. Heavy rain falls outside, with clearly visible raindrops clinging to the side window glass. Through the wet window, blurred city street lights and traffic create colorful bokeh against the dark night. Soft artificial interior light, like a dome light or camera flash, illuminates her face and upper body, creating dramatic contrast with the dark rainy exterior. The image has a smartphone photography aesthetic with cinematic depth of field. No watermark. No artificial smoothing. Realistic skin texture and authentic raindrops on glass.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Young Asian woman with long straight dark hair sitting in car passenger seat at night. Black spaghetti strap top, delicate gold necklace, calm neutral expression looking at camera. Heavy rain with visible raindrops on window glass, blurred city lights bokeh through wet window. Flash photography lighting illuminates subject against dark rainy exterior. Candid portrait, smartphone aesthetic, cinematic depth of field. Not cartoon, not anime style.
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: A young Asian woman with long straight dark hair sits in a car passenger seat at night, her body angled slightly to the side as she looks at the camera. She wears a black spaghetti-strap top and a delicate gold necklace, with a calm neutral expression and soft natural makeup. Raindrops cling to the side window glass, with heavy rain visible outside. Blurred city street lights create colorful bokeh through the wet window. Soft interior light or flash illuminates her face against the dark rainy exterior. Smartphone photography aesthetic with natural skin texture.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the weather from rainy to snowy while keeping the woman, her outfit, and the interior lighting the same. Preserve the moody night atmosphere and bokeh effect.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed weather (heavy rain, raindrops clinging to glass), specific lighting (dome light/flash style)
2_realism_anchors: 'visible raindrops on window', 'city light bokeh through wet window', 'flash photography lighting'
4_negative_hygiene: prevents daylight, dry weather, cartoon/anime styles
5_spatial_consistency: clear position (passenger seat, angled to side, looking at camera)
6_lighting_storytelling: 'flash against dark rainy exterior' = moody urban intimate mood
7_environmental_storytelling: rain on window + city bokeh creates specific atmosphere
